---
name: Methodology proposal
about: Propose a new concept, structural improvement, or methodological refinement
title: "[Proposal] "
labels: proposal
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What problem in the current methodology are you trying to solve?

## Current limitation

Point to the current concept, section, or structure that feels incomplete, weak, or incorrect.

## Proposed change

Describe the proposed concept, distinction, framework, or structural change.

## Why this is better

Explain why the new version improves clarity, control, validation, accumulation, or reuse.

## Impact scope

What parts of the repository would this affect?

- terminology
- structure
- examples
- validation logic
- collaboration roles
- other

## Risks

What confusion, tradeoff, or regression could this introduce?

## Optional draft

If you already have draft wording, paste it here.
